description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short, cylindrical barrel that is matte black in color and capped with a gray muzzle. The stock is made of dark brown wood and features a pronounced pistol grip, which is ergonomically shaped for one-handed operation. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The shotgun is mounted on a wooden display stand, which supports it from below and highlights its compact design. There is a visible under-barrel attachment, possibly a mounting rail or accessory, adding to its tactical appearance. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a wooden pistol grip stock, gray muzzle, and a large rounded trigger guard, mounted on a wooden display stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the wooden pistol grip, the gray muzzle, and the under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular gray muzzle and the alignment of the barrel with the wooden base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the shotgun with the wooden base.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves
